name: Facebook Pages
description: MCP server for Facebook Graph API operations including page management, post publishing, and social media analytics

tools.name: post_to_page
tools.description: Post text, links, or photos to a Facebook page. For IMAGE/PHOTO posts, use the 'image' parameter with a public URL - do NOT use 'link' for images. The 'link' parameter is only for sharing webpage URLs. For video uploads, use facebook-api-post-video instead. Caller MUST also include access_token=<page-level token from list_pages> — Facebook rejects the user token for /feed writes (error 210).

message.description: Post message content (used as caption for photos)

image.description: Image/photo URL to post (must be publicly accessible). Use this for posting images - NOT the 'link' parameter.

link.description: Webpage URL to share (NOT for images - use 'image' parameter for photos)

photos.description: Array of photo URLs for multi-image posts (must be publicly accessible)

access_token.description: Page-level access token (from list_pages → data[].access_token). Required: Facebook rejects user-level tokens for /feed writes.

tools.name: post_photo_to_page
tools.description: Upload and post a photo to a Facebook page using a publicly accessible image URL. Use this (not post_to_page) whenever you have an image — /feed only renders link previews and ignores image fields. Caller MUST include access_token=<page-level token from list_pages>.

url.description: Publicly accessible image URL (Graph API will fetch + attach).

caption.description: Caption text for the photo (rendered as the post body).

published.description: Whether the photo is published immediately (true) or staged (false). Defaults to true.

access_token.description: Page-level access token (from list_pages → data[].access_token). Required.

tools.name: post_video
tools.description: Upload and post a video to a Facebook page using a publicly accessible URL. Videos must be under 1GB and 20 minutes. Caller MUST include access_token=<page-level token from list_pages> — Facebook rejects user tokens for /videos writes (error 210).

file_url.description: Publicly accessible URL to the video file (MP4, MOV, AVI, WMV, FLV supported)

access_token.description: Page-level access token (from list_pages → data[].access_token). Required: Facebook rejects user-level tokens for /videos writes.

tools.name: get_page_posts
tools.description: List posts from a Facebook page. Get all posts with message content, images, links, and engagement metrics (reactions, comments, shares). Supports pagination and date filtering.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

since.description: Unix timestamp or date string to filter posts from

until.description: Unix timestamp or date string to filter posts until

tools.name: get_page_insights
tools.description: Get analytics data for a Facebook page

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List all Facebook pages managed by the authenticated user with details like name, category, fan count, and verification status

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

tools.name: facebook_get_post
tools.description: Get details of a specific Facebook post including message, creation time, and engagement metrics

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

tools.name: facebook_update_post
tools.description: Update/edit the message content of a Facebook post

message.description: New message content for the post

tools.name: facebook_delete_post
tools.description: Permanently delete a Facebook post from a page. Calls DELETE /{postId} on the Graph API; postId must be the full pageId_postId format that post_to_page / post_photo_to_page / post_video return as `id`. Page-level access_token is required (user-level tokens are rejected with error 210, same as the write endpoints).

postId.description: Facebook post ID in pageId_postId format (the `id` value returned by the post_to_page family).

access_token.description: Page-level access token (from list_pages → data[].access_token). Required: Facebook rejects user-level tokens for delete on page posts.

tools.name: create_media_container
tools.description: Instagram step 1 of 2: create a media container with image/video URL and caption. Returns containerId for step 2 (publish_media_container). For videos, sync=true (default) waits for processing to complete. The IG Business account must be linked to a Facebook Page that this connection has access to (instagramAccountId comes from list_pages with fields=...,instagram_business_account{id}).

instagramAccountId.description: Instagram Business Account ID (from the linked FB Page's instagram_business_account.id)

image_url.description: URL of image to post (for IMAGE/CAROUSEL). Snake_case is canonical per Graph API.

video_url.description: URL of video to post (for REELS). Snake_case is canonical per Graph API.

media_type.description: Type of media (VIDEO is deprecated, use REELS for videos)

sync.description: For videos/reels: wait for processing before returning. Default true.

access_token.description: Page-level access token (from list_pages → data[].access_token of the FB Page that owns this IG account). Required for IG Business writes.

tools.name: get_container_status
tools.description: Poll an Instagram media container's processing status before publishing. Returns {id, status_code, status}. status_code values: FINISHED (ready to publish), IN_PROGRESS (still processing — Reels especially take time), ERROR (transcode/validation failed), EXPIRED (container older than 24h, must recreate). Calls GET /{containerId}?fields=status_code,status on the Graph API.

access_token.description: Page-level access token (the same one used to create the container).

tools.name: publish_media_container
tools.description: Instagram step 2 of 2: publish the container created in step 1. Returns the published media id.

creation_id.description: Alias for containerId — Graph API expects this field name.

access_token.description: Page-level access token (from list_pages). Required for IG Business writes.
